ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: IP address of the Niko Home Control controller

exclude.title: Excluded Actions
exclude.description: Action IDs to exclude from Homebridge

time.title: Blind Travel Times
Travel Time (seconds)
time.description: Time in seconds for the blind to travel from fully open to fully closed.
Override the default 30-second travel time for specific blinds

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Log all raw messages from the Niko controller to the Homebridge log. Useful for troubleshooting. Disable when not needed.
